title: Freiburg, Baden-Württemberg — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Freiburg, Baden-Württemberg: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Freiburg is a city in Baden-Württemberg with a population of 231,000. Germany’s greenest city, nestled in the Black Forest, a solar-powered university town with a stunning Gothic cathedral and a sunny climate.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
